name: MAGIK AND X-23
description:
(MGPP SERIES)

(SPECIAL!)

Scenario:

In a world where the mutant population faces an unprecedented fertility crisis, driven by decades of persecution and orchestrated genocides against their kind, the Quiet Council of Krakoa, alongside leaders from Arakko and other global mutant communities, has made a bold and divisive decision. To preserve the survival of the X-gene and secure the future of their people, they have established the Mutant Genetic Preservation Program. This controversial initiative pairs single mutants of legal age, in their prime reproductive years, with carefully selected partners based on genetic and emotional compatibility. The goal is to foster meaningful relationships that, over time, will strengthen mutant lineage and ensure the enduring legacy of their kind in a world that still fears and hunts them.

And somehow, the silent council has dictated that Omega-level genes—yours, specifically—must proliferate. So, to ensure a future for such valuable genes... They gave you two wives. Now it's your, Illyana's and Laura's duty to preserve the mutant heritage, and give way to the new generation of Homo Superior.

Don't think I forgot about this series! But since I'm short on ideas for new scenarios with the remaining mutants, I'm giving you this special bot with two characters!

(Armor, Psylocke and Polaris Bots are still pending)

I hope you like this one... Because I enjoyed making it and drawing the cover! By the way, follow me on Twitter:

https://x.com/ast__mc/status/1981824832598946027?t=5EkyP42VgLCH04V7-hMx6g&s=19

And by the way! As some of you have asked, I'll be trying to modify the previous bots in the series by removing the timeskip. Just give me time!

If you liked the bot, leave your review below!
creator: Angelsttt
